fixtures._comment: agentic-chat turn 1 — goldfish name. No turnIndex gate: the probe sends 3 sequential turns in one thread; turnIndex would restrict this to the first turn only.

response.content: How about Bubbles? It is friendly, classic, and easy to call out at the tank. If you want alternatives: Goldie, Finley, or Mango.

fixtures._comment: agentic-chat turn 2 — tank name. No turnIndex gate (multi-turn conversation).

response.content: Following the Bubbles theme, you could call the tank The Bubble Bowl. It pairs naturally with the goldfish's name and keeps the playful tone.

fixtures._comment: agentic-chat turn 3 — recall. No turnIndex gate (multi-turn conversation).

response.content: We named the goldfish Bubbles, and the tank The Bubble Bowl.

fixtures._comment: agentic-chat e2e: multi-turn test turn 1 — 'My name is Alice.' (ported from the peer integrations' _from-feature-parity fixtures; substring-anchored on the longer phrase so it does not collide with other Alice prompts).

response.content: Nice to meet you, Alice! How can I help you today?

fixtures._comment: agentic-chat e2e: multi-turn test turn 2 — 'What name did I just give you?' Response must contain 'Alice' so the test's context-retention assertion passes.

match.userMessage: What name did I just give you

response.content: You told me your name is Alice.
